AddRecord.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](DNS/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
AddRecord.rr: Host record. Must not duplicate existing records. The combined length of the record value and zone name must not exceed 255 characters
AddRecord.type: DNS record type. Supported types: A, AAAA, CNAME, TXT, MX, PTR, SRV
AddRecord.priority: Priority of the MX record. Valid range: [0, 100]. Required when the record type is MX
AddRecord.ttl: Time to live. Valid range: [5, 24*3600]. Default is 60
